summary: Specify how to check and ignore colored shapes on colorless layers during reading lef or def data. If true, error out if a colored shape is on a colorless layer; if false, give error message and ignored the color.
description: Specify how to check and ignore colored shapes on colorless layers during reading lef or def data. If true, error out if a colored shape is on a colorless layer; if false, give error message and ignored the color.
